title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Senior Teacher in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!
